name: Spec Aligner
rationale: The compiler gate lacks spec-to-release traceability.

name: PR Narrator
rationale: Narration is only an artifact and has no proven release provenance chain.

name: Review Router
rationale: Recommendation-only routing and progressive disclosure are explicit in the proposal.

name: Decision Log
rationale: A redacted feedback loop is not a stable decision-to-release traceability model.

name: Issue Gardener
rationale: The compiler gate lacks lifecycle IDs and orphan detection.

name: Design Sync
rationale: A privacy-gated demonstration outline is not browser or visual QA.

name: Security Buddy
rationale: Threat permission and data-flow review are explicit compiler evidence.

name: Knowledge Base
rationale: Source provenance is related but does not establish a knowledge-base runtime.

name: Onboarding Map
rationale: A text decision diagram does not cover onboarding context or newcomer validation.

name: Retrospective Bot
rationale: The feedback loop does not retain release-linked retrospective evidence.

name: Agent Swarm
rationale: The control-plane proposal intentionally excludes agent execution.

name: Playwright Scout
rationale: The demonstration boundary does not implement browser QA.

name: Terminal Sense
rationale: A contract describes evidence but does not operate a terminal.

name: CI Fixer
rationale: The harness does not own scheduler or retry policy.

name: Release Notes
rationale: The compiler gate does not provide a release-note provenance chain.

name: Data Cleaner
rationale: A data action needs scheduler budgets cancellation and containment.

name: Screenshot QA
rationale: The privacy gate does not define screenshot baselines.

name: Changelog Miner
rationale: Feedback signals are not a changelog source model.

name: Dependency Guard
rationale: The harness does not schedule dependency checks.

name: Nightly Runner
unique_gap: Allowlist budget cancellation and circuit breaker
rationale: No registered experiment owns scheduler safety.

name: Context Pack
rationale: A project map does not define reusable context-pack selection or expiry.

name: Repo Cartographer
rationale: The proposal defines a bounded project map with evidence and exclusions.

name: Test Pilot
rationale: The proposal requires real-output acceptance evidence.

name: Debug Radar
rationale: An output harness does not define a debugging workflow.

name: Refactor Lens
rationale: The proposal does not define refactor analysis or criteria.

name: API Stitcher
rationale: A generic contract does not define integration design.

name: Migration Buddy
rationale: The proposal does not define migration sequencing.

name: Docs Whisperer
rationale: The compiler gate does not provide stale-document provenance.

name: Prompt Harness
rationale: Prompt claims fit the baseline and output evidence contract.

name: Ship Checklist
rationale: A release checklist needs a disposition model beyond acceptance checks.

name: Planning with Files
rationale: Source provenance does not define a planning-file lifecycle.

name: Superpowers
rationale: Routing and progressive disclosure are explicit; source claims remain unverified.

name: Code Review
rationale: Role separation does not create a code-review implementation.

name: Webapp Testing
rationale: A demonstration boundary is not browser testing.

name: Code Simplifier
rationale: The harness does not define simplification quality criteria.

name: UI UX Pro Max
unique_gap: Verified source and safe design boundary
rationale: No reliable source identity or scope is established.

name: MCP Builder
rationale: MCP registration requires an independent high-risk boundary.

name: Ralph Loop
unique_gap: Verified source and bounded loop semantics
rationale: Only a pause-and-handoff concept is relevant.

name: PPTX
rationale: Planning separation does not provide a generation runtime.

name: Skill Creator
rationale: Routing does not create or modify a Skill.
